parents.subject: LU-8668 tests: print more information about dd failure

commit.subject: LU-8588 osp: serialize deactivation vs creation
commit.message:
LU-8588 osp: serialize deactivation vs creation

otherwise orphan cleanup procedure can destroy just consumed objects.

Change-Id: Id7027c2d370f04a46e1e2d1725e04bba4990a6e1
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
